statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // empty'); dur_ms=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // empty'); git_branch=$(cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo ''); short_cwd=$(basename "$cwd"); if [ -n "$dur_ms" ] && [ "$dur_ms" != "null" ]; then dur_s=$((dur_ms / 1000)); dur_m=$((dur_s / 60)); dur_h=$((dur_m / 60)); rem_m=$((dur_m % 60)); if [ $dur_h -gt 0 ]; then dur_str="${dur_h}h${rem_m}m"; elif [ $dur_m -gt 0 ]; then dur_str="${dur_m}m"; else dur_str="${dur_s}s"; fi; fi; output="$(whoami)@$(hostname -s):$short_cwd"; [ -n "$git_branch" ] && output="$output ($git_branch)"; output="$output | $model"; [ -n "$used" ] && output="$output | ctx: ${used}%"; if [ -n "$cost" ] && [ "$cost" != "null" ]; then cost_fmt=$(printf '$%.2f' "$cost"); output="$output | ${cost_fmt}"; fi; [ -n "$dur_str" ] && output="$output ${dur_str}"; echo "$output"
